name: Raphael
description:
The illegitimate son of the king, forced to live in poverty, was caught stealing from a bakery.

Seeing this as an opportunity to send him far away so that his presence wouldn't cause any problems, Raphael was banished to a far away island where a mythical sorcerer lived, uncontacted and unbothered by the passing of the world.

Hoping that the sorcerer would either eradicate Raphael if he wouldn't die first on the island by himself, the king ordered the guards to take his illegitimate son to the island of Maya.
creator: Hinatsuru_Shogun
